api_version.description: Vendor API version override for this schema. `null` (default) syncs on the source's pinned version. Must be one of the source type's supported versions. User-managed: version-migration tooling never changes it. Not available for webhook-sync schemas.

cdc_table_mode.description:
For CDC syncs: consolidated, cdc_only, or both.

* `consolidated` - consolidated
* `cdc_only` - cdc_only
* `both` - both

enabled_columns.description: Names of source columns to sync. `null` (default) syncs all columns. Primary-key columns and the active incremental field are always retained, even if not listed here.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this external data schema.

incremental_field.description: Column name used to track sync progress.

incremental_field_lookback_seconds.description: Seconds to subtract from the stored incremental watermark at sync time, so each incremental run re-reads a rolling overlap window and catches late or backdated rows. Applies to timestamp/date incremental fields only. The stored watermark is unchanged. Maximum 5184000 (60 days).

anyOf.description:
* `integer` - integer
* `numeric` - numeric
* `datetime` - datetime
* `date` - date
* `timestamp` - timestamp
* `objectid` - objectid
* `xid` - xid

incremental_field_type.description:
Data type of the incremental field.

* `integer` - integer
* `numeric` - numeric
* `datetime` - datetime
* `date` - date
* `timestamp` - timestamp
* `objectid` - objectid
* `xid` - xid

primary_key_columns.description: Column names for primary key deduplication.

value.description: Comparison value; must match the column's type. For `IN` / `NOT IN`, a comma-separated list (e.g. `1, 2, 3` or `'a','b'`).

row_filters.description: Predicates ANDed onto the source query so only matching rows sync. Each is `{column, operator, value}`; `null`/empty (default) syncs all rows. The operator must be one of `> >= < <= = != IN "NOT IN"` and the value must match the column's type (for `IN`/`NOT IN`, a comma-separated list like `1, 2, 3` or `'a','b'`). Applied on the next sync — not retroactive to already-synced rows.

sync_time_of_day.description: UTC time of day to run the sync (HH:MM:SS).

anyOf.description:
* `full_refresh` - full_refresh
* `incremental` - incremental
* `append` - append
* `webhook` - webhook
* `cdc` - cdc
* `xmin` - xmin

sync_type.description:
Sync strategy: incremental, full_refresh, append, cdc, or xmin.

* `full_refresh` - full_refresh
* `incremental` - incremental
* `append` - append
* `webhook` - webhook
* `cdc` - cdc
* `xmin` - xmin
